rendering_standard: SVG inline, viewBox 500x400 minimum, aria-label required, answer never encoded in visual

visual_generators.description: Number line from 0 to 5 with tick marks at 0.1 intervals; target irrational shown as unlabeled point — Mathlete approximates value
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Target point has NO decimal label — Mathlete enters the approximation

visual_generators.description: Number line showing two irrational values as approximate points for visual comparison; question asks which is greater
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Labels show the radical form, not decimal — prevents answer leak

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with two lines graphed; intersection is either a labeled point, no intersection, or coincident lines
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Intersection point coordinates NOT labeled — MC asks student to identify

visual_generators.description: HTML table with x and y columns (4–5 rows); may or may not represent a function
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Table shows raw values; no hint text about whether it's a function

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane graph showing a relation — may fail vertical line test; Mathlete classifies as function or not
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: No vertical line indicator drawn on the visual

visual_generators.description: Graph showing either a straight line or a curve; Mathlete identifies as linear or nonlinear
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: No text annotation on graph identifying its type

visual_generators.description: Table of (x, y) pairs from which Mathlete writes the linear equation; displayed as clean HTML table
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Answer column in table NOT labeled with slope or intercept values

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing pre-image triangle; Mathlete applies translation (a, b) and identifies new vertices
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Image NOT drawn — Mathlete computes and enters coordinates

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing pre-image with a labeled line of reflection (x-axis, y-axis, or y=x); Mathlete finds reflected image
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Dashed line labeled by equation; image NOT shown

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane showing pre-image triangle; rotation angle and direction labeled; Mathlete computes new coordinates
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Arc/indicator shows rotation direction; image NOT drawn

visual_generators.description: Coordinate plane with pre-image triangle and center at origin; scale factor labeled; Mathlete finds image coordinates
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Scale factor labeled on diagram; image NOT drawn

visual_generators.description: Two similar triangles or quadrilaterals side-by-side; some sides labeled, one side as '?'; Mathlete sets up proportion
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Missing side shown as '?' — no proportion hint visible

visual_generators.description: Labeled triangle with two angle values (numeric or algebraic expression) and one angle as '?'; may include exterior angle
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Total 180° not labeled; Mathlete applies theorem

visual_generators.description: Right triangle with legs and hypotenuse labeled; one side as '?'; right angle marked with square symbol
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Only ONE side is '?'; formula NOT shown on diagram

visual_generators.description: Contextual diagram — e.g., a ladder leaning against a wall with ground, wall, and ladder labeled; right angle at base
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Scenario labels are descriptive (e.g., 'wall height'); no formula shown

visual_generators.description: 3D cylinder with radius and height arrows labeled; Mathlete applies V = πr²h
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Dimension values shown; formula NOT on diagram

visual_generators.description: 3D cone with radius and height labeled; Mathlete applies V = (1/3)πr²h
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Values shown; fraction coefficient NOT indicated on diagram

visual_generators.description: Scatter plot on labeled coordinate axes with 8–12 data points; may include a drawn line of best fit
visual_generators.usage: Shared across M8.SP.1.1, M8.SP.1.2, M8.SP.2.1, M8.SP.2.2, M8.SP.2.3 with varying overlays
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Equation of line NOT shown on graph for M8.SP.2.3 questions — prevents answer leak
